title: DLSA Siddipet – Junior Assistant – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: DLSA Siddipet Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority, Siddipet (DLSA Siddipet) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Assistant. Candidates with BA, B.Com, LLB, B.Sc Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 18-05-2026, and closes on 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DLSA Siddipet official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Arts or Science or Commerce or Law, Knowledge or qualification in computer operation

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Siddipet Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
